svg.title: Contact API Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Full architecture of Anusha's Contact API showing user, API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB, CloudWatch, SNS, S3, and CI/CD pipeline

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Who calls the Contact API and how?')
sendPrompt('What does API Gateway do in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does the POST contact Lambda do?')
sendPrompt('What does the GET messages Lambda do?')
sendPrompt('How is DynamoDB structured in this project?')
sendPrompt('What is Terraform remote state and why use S3?')
sendPrompt('What is DynamoDB state locking in Terraform?')
sendPrompt('What CloudWatch resources are set up for this project?')
sendPrompt('How does SNS send alarm notifications?')
sendPrompt('What emails does SNS send when an alarm triggers?')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('What does GitHub Actions do in the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What environments does the pipeline deploy to?')
sendPrompt('When does the pipeline deploy to production?')

svg.text: click any box to learn more
